query: SELECT eventName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM eventLogs GROUP BY eventName ORDER BY cnt DESC;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user RGrk2thZYC4WY66.root --database Unzs4ztvsFWb6bAqqUL6Mc --execute SELECT eventName, COUNT(*) as cnt FROM eventLogs GROUP BY eventName ORDER BY cnt DESC;
